Localization.Description: Execution of some SQL commands may indicate that information about the PostgreSQL database users is retrieved, which may indicate attacker activity

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.application.account.name} retrieved the PostgreSQL database role list using an SQL command on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} retrieved information about their account name in the PostgreSQL database using an SQL command on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} retrieved the PostgreSQL database user information using an SQL command on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} checked whether they have the superuser permissions in the PostgreSQL database using an SQL command on host {event_src.host}
